entry.title: Re: how to delete condition table (C901)
entry.content:
Hi DominikTylczyn

   Thank you for reply ,     I am new for SAP ,the table created by others ,I dont' know what kind of conditions are they , Here are the entries in VKOA，It response  "table not exist "  when I double click the entries.

901 分销渠道/科目分配组/科目代码

902 分销渠道/科目分配组/科目分配组/科目代码

The SAP expert  told me that delete it from se11 , but it still exist in VKOA and SE80, I have create a incident ，but  a few days passed ,it hasn't been resolved yet.

entry.title: Re: Identity lifecycle management with SAP BTP and Micros...
entry.content:
Hi

You need to configure the attributes in IAS for the application (look for the app named "SAP BTP Subaccount xxxxx"). For example, If you're using SAML and the standard EntraID names in IAS should look like below: 

The User Name is taken from the Subject name identifier:

If you're using SAML you can use "SAML Tracer" tool. It's available as extension for Chrome/Mozilla for example. You can also check in IAS (Monitoring & Reporting -> Troubleshooting Logs) the OIDC tokens and the details of the attributes being sent.

Using Federation or not depends on what you want to achieve. For some integrations it's recommended or might be required (i.e for SF depending on your EntraID attributes might be required to map the user to a SF Login ID if you're not sending it from your IDP). In general the federation will help you to enrich and play around with attributes from your IDP + Attributes from IAS (if users exist in IAS).

Be aware that SAP is changing some of this logic these days so might note strange behavior in the attribute mappings from time to time 

Hope it helps.

Diego

entry.title: Re: Connection ECC to CPI
entry.content: hi @taherbalazzi , yes i did encounter that issue and it was related to the process runtime instance was configured (step JSON parameters) or how the iflow was setup (perhaps using the ESBMessaging role). did you test same thing with a tool like postman?

entry.title: How to assign Users as Approver and Requester in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am now creating Approval Form using SAP Build Process Automation.

1. And I am confusing how can I assign users as Approver and Requester Roles.

2. And how can I give administrator role to user also?

Could you please give me advice about these questions?

And if you have any related documentation, cloud you please share with me?

 

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: SAP Fiori Application Generator: How to connect to a bearer authenticated OData Service?
entry.content:
I have been experimenting with generating applications using the SAP Fiori Application Generator npm extension. I do not face any issue connecting to my locally run mock OData service during step 2: connect to a data source, which does not require any authentication.

However, the extension only seems to support connecting to an OData service that has been set up with basic authentication (i.e. requires a username and password). However, my live OData service has been set up with bearer authentication.

I have the following questions:

  1. How can I connect to my bearer authenticated OData service using the SAP Fiori Application Generator extension?
  2. If this isn't possible, how can I manually set up my app to support this?

entry.title: 范围项目5W2-集团评估使用须知
entry.content:
背景介绍

除法定评估外，您还想要使用集团评估功能。 集团评估提供在不同联营公司之间销售/采购货物和服务的集团能够抵销这些公司之间的利润的功能。

另外，最近发现有正在实施的S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition的项目，激活了集团评估的功能，但是后面发现又不需要，配置中也发现了错误，导致不得不对系统进行重置，最后影响项目周期的意外情况。

所以这篇博文目的既是介绍功能，也是提醒慎重选择项目范围。

前提条件

• 客户使用 SAP Central Business Configuration (CBC) 作为配置环境。

• 要使用集团评估功能，需要激活范围项目：5W2 - 集团评估

• 为了能够使用 5W2 范围项目，强烈建议您也使用以下范围项目：

o 5HP - 高级公司间库存转储

o 5D2 - 高级公司间销售

o 5MQ - 含已评估在途库存的现货销售

仅当使用这些范围项目并具备相应的专家配置时，您才能将集团评估中的利润抵销用于库存会计核算。

有关详细信息，请参阅以下 SAP Help Portal 文档： 

 (5W2)集团评估

 (5D2)高级公司间销售

 (5HP)高级公司间库存转储

(5MQ)含已评估在途库存的现货销售 

功能限制

为了使用5W2,存在以下这些功能限制：

  1. 为了能够激活 5W2 范围项目，不能激活以下不兼容的范围项目：

传统公司间库存转储范围项目：

  • 1P9 - 公司间库存转储
  • 2TS - 公司间库存转储退货

传统公司间销售范围项目：

  • 1HO - 公司间销售订单处理 - 国内
  • 1MX - 公司间销售订单处理 - 国际
  • 1WO - 扩展公司间销售流程
  • 2F4 - 客户退货的公司间流程

2.常规：

  • 您只能在初始方案范围设定（Initiate Scoping）活动期间激活集团评估，后续拓展方案是无法增加的。
  • 仅当使用 SAP Central Business Configuration 时才能激活集团评估。
  • 所有公司代码都必须分配到新增的集团评估分类账 (4G)。
  • 对于资产会计中税收折旧范围的使用，必须选择并激活附加非主分类账（2L 或 3L）。对于非主分类账，必须在公司代码级别分配本地会计准则。
  • 会计准则：
    • 分类账 4G 不随缺省会计准则一起提供。对于分类账 4G，需要在分类账级别分配公司会计准则。使用将会计准则分配到分类账和公司代码配置活动（标识：103556）执行此操作。在系统中进行任何过账之前，必须完成这些设置。
    • SAP 建议您向主分类账 0L 和并行分类账 4G 分配相同的公司会计准则（IFRS、USGP 或国家/地区特定会计准则）。

3.总账会计：

  • 过账货币调整：不支持包含多个分类账的分类账组中的过账，包括 4G 或分类账组中留空的过账。 在这种情况下，仅在法定分类账或集团评估分类账 (4G) 中过账货币调整。
  • 不支持以下评估运行：

- 重新分组应付账款/应收账款

- 执行进一步评估

- 执行外币评估；请改用高级外币评估运行。

  • 无法根据集团评估报告交易货币金额。显示的交易货币金额基于法定评估。请注意，这也会影响余额结转。

4.间接费用会计：

  • 集团评估和通用并行会计不支持传统分配功能。因此，主分类账的值将过账到所有分类账。检查是否可以使用通用分配代替，从而支持计算值并将其过账到各个分类账。

5.库存会计：

无法为分类账 4G 运行库存资产负债表评估（分类账 在过滤器中不可用）。由于库存资产负债表评估仅在公司代码级别运行，因此此行为是预期行为。

6.会计核算 - 物流集成：

  • 不支持传统公司间销售订单处理（范围项目 1HO（国内）和 1MX（国际））和公司间库存转储（范围项目 1P9）。这些范围项目无法与范围项目 5W2（集团评估）一起激活。请改用高级公司间业务流程。有关详细信息，请参阅高级公司间销售和高级公司间库存转储。
  • 高级公司间销售（范围项目 5D2）和高级公司间库存转储（范围项目 5HP）流程支持抵销公司间利润。对于其他公司间流程，抵销过账逻辑不可用。
  • 不支持供应商发票的公司间发票更正和后续借记/贷记。

7.生产会计：

  • 订单计划成本：在按库存生产场景中，不会计算集团评估视图的订单计划成本。 请改为参考主分类账中的计划成本。
  • BEI：基于期间的生产会计（范围项目 BEI）不支持集团评估5W2。它根据主分类账值结算成本对象余额，并将相同的值复制到其他分类账。 如果 3F0 支持您正在运行的生产场景，建议与基于事件的生产会计（范围项目 3F0）一起运行。有关 3F0 的限制，请参阅 SAP Note 3042082。

8.收入和成本会计：

  • 基于事件的收入确认：通常，对于集团评估分类账，基于事件的收入确认的过账逻辑与任何其他非主分类账的过账逻辑相同。
  • 但是，激活高级公司间销售（范围项目 5D2）以及高级公司间库存转储（范围项目 5HP）和组评估（范围项目 5W2）后，集团评估分类账中存在用于收入确认的特定过账逻辑，特别是基于事件的收入确认与现货销售的集成以及相应的收入确认代码 SFS、SFSCCM 和 SFSN。在这些场景中，为确保公司间抵销过账上下文中的过账逻辑正确，开票期间在集团评估分类账中创建的抵销过账不会在实时处理或月末关账期间触发基于事件的收入确认过账。
  • 与法定组 GAAP 分类账相比，无法为集团评估分类账 4G 维护不同的收入确认规则，因为“凭证类型”和“确认码 - 公司代码和会计准则设置”的配置取决于会计准则。

9.跨公司转包：

  • 不支持跨公司代码转包订单。

总结

包括5W2在内的所有的范围项目一旦激活，就无法回撤取消激活，唯一的办法就是重置系统，这会导致系统配置和数据丢失，以及项目周期延长。

所以请务必谨慎根据现有以及未来的业务拓展情况，酌情激活使用，慎之又慎。

附录

  • SAP Note 3093830 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud：集团评估的版本限制
  • SAP Note  3100892 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud 中的集团评估

entry.title: Re: Import Sales Orders (Part 9): Creation with Reference
entry.content:
Hi @andrj111, I fully understand the case you mentioned. But, unfortunately, it's not supported in current solution beacuse that ignore the empty value is designed behavior.

I have raised your requirement to our team product owner. And you can also raise the requriment in customer influence site.

entry.title: Re: Regarding "Data Overview" of SAP for Me
entry.content: 「HANA Disk Usage (GB)」の集計結果に関して、「Used」「Fragmented」「Free」の項目について質問があります。 例えば、systemが「SID_000」の場合、これらのデータはクライアント000で使用されているデータのみを反映していますか。 それとも、systemが「SID_000」であっても、クライアント000だけでなく、クライアント100など他のクライアントで使用されているデータも含む、ディスク全体の「Used」「Fragmented」「Free」の集計結果を示していますか。

Thanks and Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Error Encountered During Status change for Standard C...
entry.content:
Hi RaminS,

Thanks for your feedback.

I totally understand your concern. However, we need to consider the pros and cons in between.

I believe all the participants would like to have a well managed community.

If you look at the existing threads, only very little number of solutions were accepted by the questioner. Most of the time they don't come back.

Our moderation (Help accept the solution) is to ensure the follow-up questions are taken care and it's a kind of closure of the question.

As Vera mentioned, the questioner can unaccept the solution anytime.

You are welcome to provide your better ideas for community question management.

Thanks & Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: How to bring out the segment value when creating an asset?
entry.content:
How to bring out the segment value when creating an asset in the app Manage Fixed Assets?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to bring out the segment value when creating an a...
entry.content:
Based on the standard design of the app:

In the first scenario, when only filling out the cost center, the values for the profit center and segment will be automatically identified. 

In the second scenario, when only filling out profit center, the segment value will also be automatically identified. 

You can refer to the KBA for reference.

3541700 - How to bring out the segment value when creating an asset? - SAP for Me

entry.title: CAP Forbidden error, multiple batch requests - CAP Authorization
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am testing CAP authorization, I have created a role 'VIEWER' and granting read access only to users with this role. I didnt assign this role, but generally we got Forbidden error in one request. I see it is sending multiple batch requests for forbidden and it is never ending.

 @(restrict: [
         {
             grant: 'READ',
             to   : 'Viewer'
         },

entry.title: Re: SOST Mail jons delete
entry.content: hi @RobertoNogueron deleting sost data is not something to overlook. check note 988057 and then, if you are in a rush and working on a sandbox system, you may run RSBCS_REORG  with creation date and status code (for example) 826. cheers!A

entry.title: Purchase Order Cancelled form template in S4HANA system
entry.content:
I would like to know PO cancelled template is available in S4HANA system like SAP ByDesign.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Re: Regarding "Data Overview" of SAP for Me
entry.content: 「SID_000」の場合、クライアント000で使用されているデータのみを反映します。

entry.title: Re: Clarification about BS22 Changes for System Status in...
entry.content:
For the TECO, which control the production order relevant activities, just for example: Forbitten Goods receipt for production order, Cleaning the reservation for the component, Forbitten Goods issue, Forbitten confirmation, and close the PR for the subcontracting operations ... All the activates which are about the production order, but there no direct relationship with purchasing order.

Since for the components Purchasing relevant activities should be happened before the production, and they are separate processes in SAP. So there is no possible to restrict the purchasing process in BS22, thank you!

entry.title: how to auto update text from DO document to material document when post goods issue
entry.content:
Hi to all,

 

We do some ehancements on the DO screen, where there are many text fields in the header text in DO. Is there any way that when I post goods issue DO, one field in this header text can automatically update to the header text of material document and accounting document?

Please anyone suggest me.

Regards,

entry.title: SAP Business Bydesign Data Source
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can anyone please help me to locate the data source of the column "Approval Process" in New Business-->Sales Quote work center as shown below:

 i tried the documentation "Characteristic Index SAP Business ByDesign, February 2024" but no luck 😔

Regards,

Murali N

entry.title: SAP Blog in Awaiting Review
entry.content: How long it will take for moderators to approve the blog. My blog is in Awaiting Review for more than a week

entry.title: Re: how to auto update text from DO document to material...
entry.content:
@Huongvt wrote:

Hi to all,

 

We do some ehancements on the DO screen, where there are many text fields in the header text in DO. Is there any way that when I post goods issue DO, one field in this header text can automatically update to the header text of material document and accounting document?

Please anyone suggest me.

Regards,

Hello,
You can achieve this by using a user medicare card exit or BAdI (Business Add-In) in SAP. Specifically, you can use the USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT or USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE in the included MV50AFZ1. These exits allow you to update the header text of the material document and accounting document automatically when posting a goods issue.

Best Regards,
Julie Doyle

entry.title: Speaker Registration Now Open for SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 7th December 2024 – Business AI Edition
entry.content:
Learn more about the event in our announcement blog post.

Speaker Tracks for Your Proposal:

  1. Track 2: Building AI Applications on SAP BTP
    Delve into the technicalities of building AI-powered applications on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Share how developers and architects can leverage SAP BTP to create impactful AI solutions that drive business value.
  2. Track 3: Business AI Solutions from the Ecosystem (Partners & Customers)
    Highlight successful AI solutions developed by SAP partners and customers. Present case studies, implementation experiences, and collaborative projects that demonstrate the innovative use of Business AI within the SAP ecosystem.
  3. Track 4: Embedded AI Across Solutions (SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, and Other SAP Products)
    Explore how Embedded AI is integrated into various SAP products like SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, and CX. Discuss how these intelligent features are transforming business processes and enhancing user experiences.

Why Speak at SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024 – Business AI Edition?

  • Showcase Your Expertise: Share your knowledge with an engaged audience of SAP professionals.
  • Network with Peers: Connect with fellow experts, partners, and SAP enthusiasts.
  • Gain Recognition: Boost your professional profile and gain visibility within the SAP community.

How to Register:

Ready to share your insights at SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024 – Business AI Edition?
Register here to become a speaker and contribute to one of the most anticipated SAP community events of the year.

Next Steps:

  1. Proposal Review: Our expert team will review your submission. If shortlisted, we will reach out for more details.
  2. Internal Review: After a thorough review, we will notify you about the next steps, including presentation formats and promotional details.

We look forward to your valuable contributions and hope to see you at SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024!

Best regards,
Ranjeet

entry.title: Re: Identity lifecycle management with SAP BTP and Micros...
entry.content: @dyaryuraThank you for your comments!! I think i found the solution, i leveraged Open Id connect protocol for this instead of SAML. However as you mentioned, the logic behind the scenes would be the same.The issue in my case was i missed adding scope value as "profile" in the open id connect configuraton while defining the corporate idp in IAS. Initially, openid was the scope and later on added profile also in it.

entry.title: Re: Introducing the new Adaptation Editor experience for SAPUI5 adaptation projects
entry.content: Hi @TobiasLiljeblad It is available now as part of the SAP Fiori Tools 2411 Update.

Soma

entry.title: Creating operations are disabled for entity '$AE_UIX#SRVD#ZSD_WTY_CLAIM~ZWTY_CLAIM_CUSTOM_ENTIT'
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to make a POST OData call in the Gateway client, but I am encountering the following error:

"Creating operations are disabled for entity '$AE_UIX#SRVD#ZSD_WTY_CLAIM~ZWTY_CLAIM_CUSTOM_ENTITY'."

We have created a wrapper class that calls the BAPI `BAPI_WARRANTYCLAIM_CREATE`. Additionally, we have developed an OData service using RAP.

Could you please help me understand how to resolve this issue?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Regarding "Data Overview" of SAP for Me
entry.content: ご回答ありがとうございます。 クライアント000だけでなく、クライアント100を含む他のクライアントが使用しているデータも含め、ディスク全体の「Used」、「Fragmented」、「Free」の集計結果を表示することは可能ですか。 また、毎回（毎月）「SID_000」、「SID_100」など、全てのクライアントの集計結果を表示することはできますか。

entry.title: Re: Margin Analysis (CO-PA) in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
sI have a doubt on Process order concepts and production orders, one of my client having an issue with orders, in KEU1  I created a CO-PA assessment Cycle based on , Sender is the one cost center and One cost element and Receivers , i am taking here product (Finished Good ), orders created in the t.code (CR01 ) and also taking the Division. when i am executing the Cycle in KEU5 its giving an error there no receivers.

and i taken as a base in Receiver Tracing factor is Cost Of Goods manufactured account.

here i am giving the some screenshots for your reference please advice me how i can allocate the cost based on process orders here my client is using the Account Based CO-PA.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

KEU5 i am not the tracing factor in Quantity as i given in orders. how i can do this .please solve the issue 


please give me possible solution 

thankyou .

entry.title: How to create New Return to Supplier for inbound delivery
entry.content:
How to create New Return to Supplier for inbound delivery


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to create New Return to Supplier for inbound deli...
entry.content:
There are two views of the return to supplier; the buyer's view and the logistics view. If you create the return to supplier from one of the logistics work centers, you can only request the goods issue. The buyer, on the other hand, can also decide on the follow-up process and request a credit memo and/or a replacement delivery. See the two alternatives below.

You can create a new return to supplier in the following work centers:

  • In the Purchase Requests and Orders work center — in the common tasks section. Here, you are provided with the buyer's view of the return to supplier.

  • In the Outbound Logistics work center — in the common tasks section. Here, you are provided with the logistics view of the return to supplier.

  • In the Inbound Logistics work center — in the common tasks section. Here, you are provided with the logistics view of the return to supplier.

  • In the Third-Party Logistics work center — in the common tasks section. Here, you are provided with the logistics view of the return to supplier.

Create a New Return to Supplier | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: FRUN monitoring decommission
entry.content:
Dear customer,

If you want to decommission of the whole managed object from FRUN, please refer to KBA 3250065 - How to decommission unused managed objects from Focused Run.

If you just want to remove monitoring configuration for this unused system, you can delete the Monitoring configuration via transaction MAI_TOOLS. 

  1. Run transaction MAI_TOOLS
  2. Select "Configuration"
  3. Select "Delete Monitoring Configuration"
  4. From here, fill in the data of the managed system to be deleted and choose "Execute(F8)".

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Blog in Awaiting Review
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you please approach us at community@sap.com so we can further assist you have a look into the details?

Regards,

Moshe

entry.title: Single Persistent Table for Two Different Entities
entry.content:
Hi All,


I need an expert advice on a Data Modeling that I am working for a RAP-based Fiori Application. Let me explain the scenario. I have a parent database table ZDEMO_PARENT and a child database table ZDEMO_CHILD. I have to handle data stored in child table in two different ways. So I am creating two entities for the child table. But in my behavior definition, if I give same persistent table (ZDEMO_CHILD) for both entities, it will result in runtime error trying to insert duplicate key entry into the child database table as both the entities will have same keys obviously.

How do we efficiently handle this to prevent the runtime error? Managed Implementation with Unmanaged Save is one way to avoid it but do we have any other way to do it with managed save as well? 

@SAPSupport 

@Andre_Fischer

 Thanks

Swetha

entry.title: Re: Batch Determination of components in the Production Order in S/4 1709
entry.content:
Hi All,

This is for your Info & Update.
Please Note that, if you have activated the Automatic Batch Determination, with Auto Release Functionality for the EWM Managed Storage Location, system throw an Error: You must enter the Batch Number for the Material XXXX, and Release will be Rejected
Solution: Follow the SAP NOTE # 2842506 - No automatic batch determination for Process/Production orders (EWM Integration)
Thanks & Regards: Raja

entry.title: Re: How to connect ORDR to ATC1
entry.content: Did you already try to join with ORDR.AtcEntry (or any Marketing Document table) and ATC1.AbsEntry ?

entry.title: Procedure for requesting expert configuration using Worldwide Customer Requests Repository (WCR)
entry.content:
An expert configuration request is required for some configurations(ex:Purchase Account Management).
Please tell me where and how to register Worldwide Customer Requests.

entry.title: Standalone Event mesh Roadmap
entry.content:
Hello SAP /Experts,

Can you please suggest if standalone Event mesh should be used in new implementation  ,as use case is not extensive and does not require Advance event mesh solution and is not fitting in the t-shirt size of Advance event mesh scenario ,if standalone event mesh can be used in new implementation, can the monitoring capability be enhanced ?

what is SAP recommendation on usage of standalone event mesh , i am not finding any definitive information and guidance here ,please suggest.

Thanks,

Siddharth

SAP Event Mesh SAP Business Technology Platform

It also works now with just exportToExcel_1.exportReport();.

I guess there was a system issue.

Thanks again for your response.

entry.content:
The documentation for Create a Process Variant, states 

Prerequisites

  • Variant Management is a tile in your site created with SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition.

  • You have access to the variant management editor.

How can I get Variant Management tile? I don't find this listed in "Content Manager / Content Explorer / HTML5 Apps". 

I am guessing that "variant management editor" is the application that is opened by this tile. What is the role required to have access to this application?

entry.title: Re: Assign factory calendar to plant
entry.content:
Hi Kali,

If you already created factory calendar then go the plant creations T code OX10 (SPRO-IMG-Enterprises Structure-Definition-Logistics General-Define, Copy, Delete, Check Plant-1000-fill the entry Factory Calendar 01-Save).

entry.title: Different Trex version in a distributed system
entry.content:
Whether different trex version can work together in a distributed system?

We have 4 hosts landscape of Q0B ( Trex 7.01 version 75)

host01 for master server

host02 for slave server

host03 for slave server

host04 for backup server

We upgrade host02 and host03 to version 86 first. we plan to upgrade the other 2 next day.  whether TREX can work under both 75 and 86 version?

entry.title: Re: Territory Deletion / Realignment of history data (C4C...
entry.content:
@SandraRaWellstar MyChart wrote:

Hello, I deleted a territory after a realignment run, because I thought history data would be realigned, too. It hasn't. I can see the territory when clicking on history data, but I can't do any changes and the sales responsible lost authorization on all historical quotations/opportunities. This is really a big problem.

Can a deleted territory be reactivated?

How can I change the territory in history data (quotations/opp)? Field is blocked for manual changes.

Many thanks for any help!

Kind regards

Sandra

 

 

Hi Sandra,

Unfortunately, deleted territories usually can’t be directly reactivated. You’ll likely need to recreate the territory with the same settings and then reassign the historical records (quotations/opportunities) to the new one.

To update the territory in historical data:

  • Make sure you or an admin has the necessary permissions.
  • Use tools like Data Loader (if you’re on a platform like Salesforce) to bulk update the records.

If the sales rep lost access, it’s probably due to the deleted territory affecting permissions. Reassign them to the new territory to restore access.

Hope that helps!
Best regards,
Carol

entry.title: Re: Is Running SAP Commerce Cloud CCV2 on SAP Hana Databa...
entry.content:
@abhinavsingh11Well Now Urgent Care wrote:

Currently SAP Commerce Cloud CCV2 only runs on Azure SQL DB in CCV2. Is Running SAP Commerce Cloud CCV2 on SAP Hana Database in Roadmap or pipeline in future?

Currently, SAP Commerce Cloud CCv2 only supports Azure SQL Database and does not natively support SAP HANA. While SAP Commerce can be integrated with HANA in other contexts (like on SAP BTP), there's no official roadmap indicating that HANA will be supported as a database option for CCv2 in the future. SAP continues to optimize CCv2 for the Azure ecosystem.

entry.title: Re: GLM / WWI grahics as vector vs. pixel
entry.content: Hello, it seems, that dosn't support vector graphic files...

entry.title: Re: How to influence the priority of column store tables which gets unloaded due to LOW MEMORY
entry.content:
Hi

 

Is there any option to find the reason of unloads and loads in HANA? i followed the note 1977207 and the sql report "HANA_Tables_ColumnStore_UnloadsAndLoads" published in SAP Note 1969700 but it is not returning a meaningful results.

entry.title: Re: Is Running SAP Commerce Cloud CCV2 on SAP Hana Databa...
entry.content:
Hi @abhinavsingh11,
SAP Ccv2 supports only Az-SQL db, without any future pipeline for SAP HANA integration!
I hope this answers your query to close the thread.

Thanks and Regards,
Kunal Bansal
SAP CX Solution Architect

entry.title: Unable to pass Debited account into BAPI_PAYMENTREQUEST_CREATE
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We are creating payment requests programmatically using the BAPI_PAYMENTREQUEST_CREATE to update the table PAYRQ. However, we are unable to update the debited account for the payment requests to the table PAYRQC-KONTO since there is no parameter in the BAPI to pass this information. 

 

Is there any way that the debited account can be updated for payment requests programmatically?

 

 

 

Regards,

entry.title: SAP DM: SFC Report does not show SFC data collected at assembly, but API does show it.
entry.content:
Dear SAP community.

I assemble a component, which has data to collect at assembly "sfc". During assembly, I choose the component SFC.
But later, when I check in the SFC report, the SFC data is not shown.

Also in the MDO, the data seems to be missing.

But when I call the assembledComponents API from postman, I can see the assembled SFC number in the response:

Since the data is visible with the API but not in the MDO, I believe the process is set up correctly.
Does somebody else have the same issue?

Thanks in advance!
Stephan

entry.content: Solved: No OSS, No SPRO Config.  I just created a new function that converts the decimals range to 0.001.

entry.title: Re: The 'or' operation is not working across different pr...
entry.content: I see your point, but in this case, the expected behavior is to include any records that match either condition. Using 'or' allows me to return records where either the FormattedName or Email contains the substring 'stann'. The and operator would return records where both conditions must be true, which isn't the desired outcome for my scenario. Is there any way to achieve the or logic across different property names in OData?"

entry.title: No function imports available for the selected entity type, of list report selecting entity type
entry.content: No function imports available for the selected entity type, error displaying in list report and worklist of fiori elements application when selecting the add action button through guided development. tryed with all the entity sets in the service. using northwind oData service of v2 version

entry.title: Re: Migrate Full Set of Sales Partners
entry.content: To wrap it up, after opening a case for SAP, and plenty of testing, it is not possible to create crossed references for partner functions in the migration cockpit. Even using the 'Customer - extend sales organizations' object does not work. The only way to go is to migrate customer A with no references to Customer B. Then migrate Customer B with references to Customer A. And finally maintain Customer A. I have not tried to use the Mass Maintenance app yet so I can't say if it helps. I will be submitting a feature request to SAP.

entry.title: Re: Enable standard fiori app on the mobile device
entry.content:
Hi @MayurJK,

No, it's NOT as many features won't support in S/4Hana on a mobile app,  it's not even in future roadpamp!
You can always login using the browser though.

best regards,

Kunal

entry.title: Re: no SDBSETUP.EXE in Max DB update form SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

For the installation, unpack the archive into a directory of your choice and call SDBINST(.exe) there and follow the instructions.

See also: SAP MaxDB Installation on Microsoft Windows and Linux | SAP Help Portal

SDBSETUP is not supported anymore.

Regards Birgit Malik IMS SAP MaxDB

entry.title: Public Dimension Table Import Job Error
entry.content:
Hello everyone
Since Sunday, we have been receiving an error in our oData Import Jobs that update the Data Access Control in the Public Dimension Table as 'An unexpected error occurred while trying to update the dimension data.' Could this be related to the SAC 2024 Q4 update? Does anyone have any information?
Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Designing UI5 Apps as Business Solution for SAP Build Work Zone - Part 1
entry.content:
Thank you @zhen-kun_li.
Yes the instance GUID is optional as long as the service and app name are unique in your sub account. In most cases this is the case as HTML5 repository prevents deployment with duplicate Ids.
The URL which is generated by the HTML5 applications list in the cockpit does not contain the guid, however you can add it, if needed. Here the destination instance is no longer relevant but is replaced with the app-host instance GUID.

entry.title: The Art and Science of CAP (part 2) with Daniel Hutzel
entry.content:
Daniel presented a session at this year's #Devtoberfest titled "The Art and Science of CAP", in which he started to take us on a deep dive, with special background insights, into key design aspects and enduring influential software patterns & philosophies that have shaped CAP. This is the first live follow-up episode to that inaugural one.

To be best prepared for this event, you may wish to watch the first part: 🟢 The Art & Science of CAP.

In addition, you may want to read the following short blog posts, which explain various gems of insight from that first episode:

  • Keeping things simple in domain modelling with CDS
  • Restricting access via facets with masked elements
  • Separating concerns and focusing on the important stuff
  • Flattening the hierarchy with mixins

See you on Friday!

#SAPCAP #TASC

entry.title: Re: My view to prepare a report for all completed PO numbers with or without open invoice
entry.content:
Insightful Blog, Thanks for sharing.

Regards,

Leelamohan Mannem

entry.title: Architecture Decisions for Supplier Payment Collaboration
entry.content:
Summary

When planning target architecture based on business capability assessments, the Supplier Payment Collaboration (Corporate --> Finance --> Payables and Receivables Management --> Supplier Payment Collaboration) capability under the SAP Reference Architecture model lists multiple solution capabilities. This leads to the requirement to understand how these are relevant in terms of capability fulfillment and what is relevant for specific target architecture, mainly in the solution architecture domain.

This article provides an overview of related evaluation and decision criteria related to solutions to support these capabilities.

Business Requirements

The following is the definition of the related capability.

Supplier Payment Collaboration: Ability to collaborate with vendors to streamline and automate the invoice payment process.

Solution Options

The solution options listed in RBA are the following.

  1. SAP S/4HANA
  2. SAP Business Network (SBN)

Characterization of the Solution Options

1. SAP S/4HANA

The core solution within SAP S/4HANA supporting the capability is the support for Accounts Payable and subsequent payment processing. However, this does not offer direct collaboration capability beyond possibly exchange of payment information via integration; often standardized methods such as EDIFACT REMADV, e-mail payment/remittance advice to vendors.

2. SAP Business Network (SBN)

The SAP Business Network is a hosted service that connects suppliers to buying organizations, allowing them to conduct transactions over the internet. It is licensed and implemented separately from SAP S/4HANA.

The focused solution for Supplier Payment Collaboration lies within the capabilities offered by the SAP Business Network for Procurement for end-to-end collaboration.

Criteria to determine the most suitable target solution

The choice of target solution depends on the business need that will drive the additional investment required in implementing the SAP Business Network. Generally, the decision will be driven by larger collaboration requirements in supply chain capabilities and the decision to propose the use of the SAP Business Network for payment collaboration should be a complementary proposal.

It is also worth considering that target architecture in the finance area that includes the SAP Business Network for payment collaboration lends itself to further optimization from a business perspective by considering solutions for enhancement of working capital management such as SAP Discount Management (formerly SAP Ariba Dynamic Discounting) and Taulia Supply Chain Finance.

Conclusion

Customers that actively seek online collaboration by providing greater invoice and payment status visibility to their suppliers can benefit from the use of SAP Business Network for Procurement capability in addition to standard Accounts Payable within SAP S/4HANA. This is especially true for customers with high volume and complex Invoice to Payment cycles.

When designing the target architecture for the capability of Supplier Payment Collaboration, it is often a good idea to look at other capabilities supporting effective working capital management and identify complementary solutions.

entry.title: Re: API Proxy 401 Unauthorized
entry.content:
Hi,

I am doing the same. But getting same error.

entry.title: What's New in SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition 2411?
entry.content:
SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition is a software-as-a-service (Saas) solution on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) that is used to govern core attributes of business partner data (more domains planned). It is perfectly suited for organizations kick-starting a master data management initiative at low entry barriers. For details, see also the SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition overview and  deep-dive presentations.

What's New?

Continuing the blog series about innovations in SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition, I'd like to provide you with details on the latest innovations with SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition 2411. 

General Remark

Generally, a new version of several existing apps is available to provide new functionalities, for example, simulation of validation rules and additional process attributes. You can recognize the previous versions that have now been deprecated by the Deprecated label on the tiles. Note that a user can only use either all deprecated or all new versions when working with SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition. We recommend using the new version of all apps as soon as possible, as the deprecated versions will be removed in the next release.

Updates in Data Quality Management

Data quality management comes with new apps to support derivation scenarios, validation rules and analytics, and a new version of the validation rules app. 

New and enhanced apps in data quality management

In detail, the increased scope in data quality management for business partner data, enables master data specialists to:

  • Define derivation scenarios
    • With the new Define Derivation Scenarios for Business Partners app, you can create and edit derivation scenarios for your business partner data. You use derivation scenarios to deduce master data based on rules and a defined scope to ensure data quality.
  • Import/export of derivation scenarios
    • With the new Import Derivation Scenarios app, you can import derivation scenarios and their rules, which you previously downloaded using the Export Validation Rules app. Validation rules, their business details and their BRFplus implementation can be imported.

Importing derivation scenarios - log details

  • Import/export of validation rules
    • With the new Import Validation Rules app, you can import validation rules, which you previously downloaded using the Export Validation Rules app. Validation rules, their business details and their BRFplus implementation can be imported.
    • With the new Export Validation Rules app, you can download validation rules, which are managed in the Validation Rules for Business Partners app, to then import them into another system. Validation rule exports contain validation rules, their business details and their BRFplus implementation.

Exporting validation rules

  • The new version of the Validation Rules for Business Partners app offers the following new features:
    • Copy validation rules
    • Simulate validation rules to check if they work as intended and to get a preview of the rule results
    • Check if the rule is assigned to any dimensions, which is done in the Configure Data Quality Scores for Business Partners app descibed in the following:
    • The new Configure Data Quality Scores app allows key users to define their data quality reporting structure by using Categories and Dimensions. The aggregation of rules scores to data quality dimensions and categories is as follows:
Categories
  • Multiple categories supported
  • Score: Average of dimension scores 
  • Thresholds: Target, Warning, Critical 
Dimensions
  • Multiple dimensions supported 
  • Score: weighted average of rule scores 
Rules
  • Assigned to dimension with Impact
  • Multiple assignments possible, but only once per category

 Improvements in Business Partner Hierarchy Management

New features in Track Changes – Business Partner Hierarchies and Track Changes – Business Partner Hierarchy Nodes apps

  • A value help was added to the Business Partner Hierarchy and Business Partner Hierarchy Node fields. In the Track Changes - Business Partner Hierarchy Nodes app, you can search for a hierarchy ID or hierarchy description to find the associated nodes.

New features in new Manage Business Partner Hierarchies app

  • The following new features are available in the new version of the Manage Business Partner Hierarchies app:

    • The node ID is now generated automatically if you leave the field empty. The generated node ID is based on the hierarchy ID and a counter.

    • The system can generate node descriptions automatically. To generate one, add a business partner to a node and choose Accept. The first and second word of the business partner will be used as node description.
    • The search filters Business Partner and Hierarchy Node ID are now available. These filters can help you to find the associated hierarchy.
    • You can now edit a hierarchy that is in a process in the Process Information tab. In this tab, you can change the Process Description, Process Template, Priority, Due Date, and Reason.
    • When you make changes to your hierarchy, you can now see the Node Status column in the app. Edited nodes are displayed as Changed or Inserted. Deleted nodes disappear from the hierarchy.

Additional Improvements in Business Partner Processing

Additional innovations include:

  • With the new My Governance Processes - Business Partner app you can display business partner processes that have been started by you. The system displays the list of processes as well as the number of business partners, BP relationships and hierarchies.

My Governance Processes app showing all running processes initiated by oneself

  • With a new feature in the Maintain process attributes for Manage Business Partners and Manage Business Processes apps you can now maintain special attributes such as priority, due date or reason to categorize and analyze master data processes when you create or change a business partner. This information can be changed as long as the process is not activated or cancelled.

Categorization of master data creation process by priority, reason, and due date

For an overview of the innovations specified above, see also the What's New Viewer - SAP Master Data Governance, Cloud Edition 2411

Continued innovations in SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition help organizations in managing their core business partner data master for their entire system landscape. 

To stay on track, simply follow the SAP Community Topic Page for SAP Master Data Governance, read the MDG-related blogs, and join the  Q&A forum.

Best,

Markus

entry.title: In Fiori Element Screen CREATE operation of child entities is not working
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have created a Fiori element screen for our API. So earlier everything was working fine. But a couple of days ago, we observed that the CREATE operation of child entities was not working. CREATE is visible on screen, so while clicking on CREATE nothing is happening, and there are no call logs under the network tab of the developers tool while clicking on CREATE. And also, we don't have any recent code changes. We have implemented Draft with early numbering and its type of unmanaged implementation. How It is not working all of sudden. Does anyone face this issue, or can someone help with this issue??

Thank You

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors – Scrambling Framework via Integration Center
entry.content:

but I am interested in the way, how you definitely "Scramble the data", e.g. address that belongs to person 1 - will belong to person 2?

entry.title: Re: Change 'Requisition Processing State' and 'Tracking N...
entry.content:
• (As already suggested by @radinator) Press F1 on the field and then on the icon tool to display technical information on the field, you should find Data Element BEDNT doublc-click on it and get Component Name TRACKINGNO you should niw easily find the BAPI parameter that contains this field, related to item.
  • To change status look for BAPI such as BAPI_REQUISITION_RELEASE or other BAPIs of Function Group MEWF (BAPIs to set or reset status, on an item or whole PR)

entry.title: SUM PREP_EXTENSION/ADDON_LANGINC missing language for UIHR002 (Dutch)
entry.content:
Hello, we are working on the migration of our current ERP instance to S/4 HANA 2023 FPS1. In the SUM phase PREP_EXTENSION/ADDON_LANGINC  we got the msg that the ducth language is missing for the addon UIHR002.

Our question is, where can we find the missing language CD/DVD for this addon? Where to download. Our migration is for the moment jeopardized.

Thanks for your help and quick reply
